## Build Master Verification Checklist
*Please tick the boxes before submitting*

- [ ] **Binary Check**: I have verified that no unnecessary or duplicate binary files (.uasset/.umap) are included.
- [ ] **Linear History**: I have rebased/pulled the latest 'main' branch and resolved conflicts locally.
- [ ] **Testing**: I have tested this build in my personal branch (e.g., 'Mani' or 'Campbell') and confirmed stability.
- [ ] **TDD Compliance**: This PR follows the project pipeline requirements documented in the TDD.
